news.title:

Centralised diagnostics via drones may cut lab costs by up to 50% through efficiency.

The acquisition in Electronic City aims for software development and global capability center.

news.title:
Narayana Hrudayalaya's UK acquisition likely EPS neutral to slightly positive, with faster improvements in efficiency and payor mix.
Company aims to keep net debt/EBITDA under 2.5x and expects strong ROCE from the acquisition without diluting group ROCE.

news.title:
Narayana Hrudayalaya filed affidavit for amalgamation with NCLT Bengaluru on Feb 13, 2026.
Meridian Medical Research Hospital will merge; notices published on Feb 7, 2026.
news.summary:
Narayana Hrudayalaya filed affidavit for amalgamation with NCLT Bengaluru on Feb 13, 2026.
Meridian Medical Research Hospital will merge; notices published on Feb 7, 2026.

news.title:
Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd's revenue rose 61.2% YoY to ₹21,512 Mn in Q3 FY26.
Adjusted EBITDA grew 43.1% YoY to ₹4,662 Mn; net debt/equity at 0.53.
news.summary:
Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd's revenue rose 61.2% YoY to ₹21,512 Mn in Q3 FY26.
Adjusted EBITDA grew 43.1% YoY to ₹4,662 Mn; net debt/equity at 0.53.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirms Narayana Hrudayalaya's ratings citing strong market position, diverse operations, and robust financials.
Despite expansion-driven debt, credit metrics are expected to stay healthy with a stable outlook.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirms Narayana Hrudayalaya's ratings citing strong market position, diverse operations, and robust financials.
Despite expansion-driven debt, credit metrics are expected to stay healthy with a stable outlook.

news.title:
Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd. incorporates a wholly-owned subsidiary, Narayana Healthcare North Pvt. Ltd., on Jan 16, 2026.
The subsidiary will focus on healthcare services, operating hospitals, and wellness management in northern India.

news.title:
Narayana Hrudayalaya faces GST penalty of Rs. 2.46 crore for FY 2021-22.
Company denies applicability, plans to appeal, and expects no material financial impact.
news.summary:

news.title:
Narayana Hrudayalaya acquires UK-based Practice Plus Group for ₹2,100 crore, marking its entry into the UK healthcare market and expanding its international footprint.
The acquisition boosts Narayana's revenue by 53% to ₹8,393 crore, positioning it as India's third-largest hospital network, while leveraging NHS contracts and asset-light operations.
news.summary:
Narayana Hrudayalaya acquires UK-based Practice Plus Group for ₹2,100 crore, marking its entry into the UK healthcare market and expanding its international footprint.
The acquisition boosts Narayana's revenue by 53% to ₹8,393 crore, positioning it as India's third-largest hospital network, while leveraging NHS contracts and asset-light operations.

news.title:
Narayana Health focuses on domestic revenue, reducing reliance on international business per CFO Sandhya J.
Q2FY26 revenue grew 20.3% YoY to Rs 1,643.8 cr; PAT rose 29.6% to Rs 258.3 cr; shares fell 2.66% to Rs 1,954.7.
news.summary:
Narayana Health focuses on domestic revenue, reducing reliance on international business per CFO Sandhya J.
